description: This file defines the Express routes related to orchestration operations in a backend service, handling build workflows including starting, running, linking uploads, extracting and normalizing data, generating drafts, and finalizing personas.

methods.name: router.post('/start')
methods.description: Starts a new orchestration session or build workflow.

methods.name: router.post('/run-all')
methods.description: Runs the complete build workflow in a single request.

methods.name: router.get('/builds/:id')
methods.description: Retrieves the orchestration record for a given build ID.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/link-upload')
methods.description: Links upload and document IDs to an existing build.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/extract-normalize')
methods.description: Derives normalized text for a build from linked documents.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/generate-draft')
methods.description: Generates a persona draft from normalized text.

methods.name: router.post('/builds/:id/finalize')
methods.description: Finalizes the persona, saving the final blob and creating a new version if needed.
